title: Amtech G0675 100mm (4") Scraper with Soft Grip Handle
features: RUST-RESISTANT: This 100mm (4") scraper has a mirror polished, anti-rust tempered spring steel blade
VERSATILE: With a comfortable soft grip handle and a durable striking cap, it is ideal for scraping off flaky paint or applying filler
SIZE CAPACITY: 4 inch / 100 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
HOUSEHOLD & PROFESSIONAL USE: Suitable for DIYers and tradespeople alike
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Scraper See more

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: scraping off old paint, applying filler, and smoothing surfaces
